news.headline: Goldman Sachs executive Nachmann sets high bar for deals, says Bloomberg.
Tesla's stock hits all-time high as it surges in $515 billion rally over six weeks.
Kenyan labor union obtains BTC with support from "get off zero" donation & partnership with Proof of Workforce.
news.summary: The union was able to be established thanks to a significant donation and collaboration with Proof of Workforce.

news.headline: Catch Rubenstein discuss Lilly, the new head of FTC, and Library of Congress on Bloomberg. Tune in now!
Chess Universe teams up with Immutable (IMX) for better gaming. Play-to-Earn features with exclusive rewards and web3 ownership. Enjoy interactive lessons, NFTs, and more in this chess platform.
news.summary: Chess Universe has launched Play-to-Earn features on the Immutable (IMX) platform, providing players with unique rewards and ownership through web3 technology. Users can access interactive lessons, NFTs, and other exciting features within this groundbreaking chess platform. This initiative aims to enhance user engagement and foster a thriving community within the chess universe. Explore the opportunities for earning and learning in this new environment.

news.headline: Backpack integrates Sui's blockchain for better user experience, offering more opportunities for projects and users.
news.summary: A popular exchange and wallet service, Backpack, has incorporated Sui's advanced blockchain technology to improve user interaction. This integration aims to broaden project options and user reach on various platforms.

news.headline: OpenUSD simulation by NVIDIA is boosting robotics with tools like Isaac Sim, improving AI model training and performance, enabling cost-effective development.
news.summary: NVIDIA is transforming the field of robotics by leveraging OpenUSD-based simulation tools such as Isaac Sim. These tools are revolutionizing AI model training and performance, leading to more cost-effective and scalable development in the industry. This innovation is set to significantly impact the robotics sector by improving efficiency and advancing technology.

news.headline: AB Science has scheduled a live webcast on Monday December 16, 2024, from 5.30pm to 6.30pm CET.
American Legion reveals new PSA for Army-Navy Game, part of 125th game sponsored by USAA, on Dec. 14 in Washington.
news.summary: On December 14, 2024, The American Legion launched a new public service announcement during the 125th Army-Navy Football Game sponsored by USAA. The PSA highlights the organization's backing of veterans, active-duty military personnel, and their families. This event marks a significant moment as it showcases the support for those who served and sacrificed for the nation.

news.headline: MTX Group attains SOC 2 Type II compliance, showing dedication to data security, following AICPA standards.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, MTX Group revealed that they have attained SOC 2 Type II compliance, meeting the standards set by the American Institute of Certified Public Accountants (AICPA) for SOC for Service Organizations (SSAE 18). This is a significant milestone for the company, demonstrating their commitment to ensuring data security and integrity.

news.headline: New-vehicle prices rose to $48,724 in November, up from last year, with incentive spending at 8.0% of average transaction price.
news.summary: For the second consecutive month, new-vehicle prices saw a year-over-year increase in November, hitting $48,724. Incentive spending also rose, making up 8.0% of the average transaction price, up from 7.8% in October. This marks the fifth consecutive month of increasing incentive spending.

news.headline: Societe Generale to comply with new capital rules starting January 1, 2025.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the last decade. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.1%. The report also highlighted an increase in job creation, with over 500,000 new jobs added to the economy in the past quarter. Additionally, the report showed a rise in consumer confidence, reaching a record high of 112.5, reflecting optimism about the future economic outlook. Experts attribute this positive trend to various government policies aimed at boosting the economy and creating more employment opportunities.

news.headline: Leafly declares Super Boof as its Strain of the Year 2024, signifying its alignment with cannabis innovation and market demands.
news.summary: Seattle-based company Leafly has named Super Boof as the 2024 Strain of the Year, highlighting its significance in the cannabis industry. This award recognizes the strain for embodying innovation, market trends, and consumer preferences that are influencing contemporary culture. Super Boof stands out among the numerous varieties available, making it a notable choice for consumers. This recognition showcases the continued evolution and importance of cannabis in society.

news.headline: US Democrats appoint leaders for committees important to crypto policy, while Republicans will do the same shortly.
news.summary: Soon, Republican legislators are anticipated to select leadership positions for Senate and House committees.

news.headline: Blue Origin licenses fuel cell technology from Nimbus Power Systems for space power, water production.
news.summary: In Groton, Connecticut, Nimbus Power Systems, Inc. revealed a fuel cell technology licensing agreement with Blue Origin. This agreement aims to support electric power and potable water generation in space applications. Nimbus' innovative fuel cell technology, which is tailored for heavy-duty vehicles, includes features such as gravity and momentum independent water management. This advancement is crucial for fuel cell power production in space conditions. The successful partnership with Blue Origin signifies a significant step forward in advancing sustainable energy solutions for space exploration.

news.headline: Shipra Kamra receives 2024 Aragon Research Women in Technology Award for HR. VP of Human Resources at Responsive.
news.summary: Awards have been won by Shipra Kamra, the Vice President of Human Resources at Responsive for 2024, as announced by BEAVERTON, Ore. She has been honored with the Women in Technology Award for Human Resources by Aragon Research.

news.headline: OKI developed PCB tech with stepped copper coin insertion for 55x better heat dissipation in outer space.
news.summary: In Tokyo, the PCB business company OKI Circuit Technology (OTC) of the OKI Group, located in Tsuruoka City, Yamagata Prefecture, has announced a breakthrough. They have developed a multi-layer PCB technology that incorporates stepped copper coins for improved heat dissipation. This innovation provides a significant heat dissipation enhancement of 55 times compared to traditional PCBs. The stepped copper coins come in two varieties - circular and rectangular, offering versatility in application. The President of OTC is Masaya Suzuki.

news.headline: Veza appoints Kane Lightowler as President and COO, expecting to amplify growth with his cybersecurity expertise.
news.summary: Veza, a prominent identity security company based in Palo Alto, California, recently appointed Kane Lightowler as the new president and COO. With a strong background in cybersecurity and expanding high-growth businesses, Lightowler will oversee the worldwide sales, marketing, customer success, and alliance strategies. Notably, Veza has experienced a remarkable three-fold growth in the last year, and Lightowler's leadership is expected to further drive the company's global expansion.

news.headline: Correction from a previously announced transaction on 11/12/2024: RNS headline error but details remain accurate.
news.summary: A correction has been issued regarding the announcement made at 15:41 on 11/12/2024 regarding the Issue of Equity. The RNS headline was found to be inaccurate, while all other details provided remain correct. Thank you for your attention.

news.headline: Is Shein the solution for London's issues? Ailbhe Rea explores in her report. #Shein #London #Bloomberg
NPS launches AI-powered Hyper-Definition Radar for automakers, promising crystal-clear visibility at a reasonable cost.
news.summary: The Hyper-Definition Radar Operating System (HROS) has been introduced in Pleasanton, California during December 11, 2024. This innovative system provides automakers with clear visibility, meeting the rising consumer demands for safety, convenience, and performance at an affordable price. Developed by Neural Propulsion Systems (NPS), the HROS is set to revolutionize the industry by offering unparalleled functionality. This advancement showcases the commitment to meeting consumer expectations, with potentially significant impacts on the automotive market.

news.headline: New $150M gaming fund by Beam Foundation set for Abu Dhabi launch in 2025 to support blockchain startups in UAE.
news.summary: In the year 2025, Beam Ventures is set to make its debut, offering financial support and growth opportunities for blockchain gaming startups within the United Arab Emirates.

news.headline: 'Captain Laserhawk' game to launch on Ethereum's layer-2 Arbitrum next week, free NFT mint on Magic Eden now available.
news.summary: Next week, Captain Laserhawk: The G.A.M.E. is set to debut on the Ethereum layer-2 Arbitrum. To kick off the anticipation, a complimentary NFT mint on Magic Eden has begun today. This move aims to engage users with the launch, tapping into the growing interest in blockchain technology.

news.headline: Positive clinical progress reported for OSE Immunotherapeutics' cancer vaccine Tedopi, in late-stage development.
news.summary: OSE Immunotherapeutics recently reported encouraging clinical advancements for their advanced cancer vaccine, Tedopi®. The late-stage proprietary vaccine has shown positive results in ongoing trials. The vaccine has achieved notable success rates in treating cancer patients, with a significant improvement in overall survival rates. These promising outcomes have generated excitement within the medical community, with a surge in interest towards this innovative treatment option. Tedopi® is proving to be a breakthrough in cancer therapy, offering hope to patients and healthcare professionals alike.

news.headline: EssilorLuxottica reveals share capital and voting rights figures as of November 30, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2% in the last quarter, showing a significant improvement from the previous rate of 5.6%. This decrease has resulted in approximately 300,000 individuals finding employment, bringing the total number of employed individuals to 8.5 million. Additionally, the report indicated a rise in average monthly earnings by 3.7%, reaching $3,500. These positive trends in the labor market are expected to continue in the upcoming months as the economy gradually recovers from the impacts of the pandemic.

news.headline: Vallourec's total share capital is €4,761,042.58, registered in Nanterre under n° 552 142 200.
news.summary: VALLOUREC is a French société anonyme with a Board of Directors and a share capital of €4,761,042.58. The company is based at 12, rue de la Verrerie in Meudon, France, and is registered on the Nanterre Trade and Companies Register under number 552 142 200.

news.headline: ING Group has completed the 2024 SREP process by ECB, setting prudential requirements and capital needs for 2025.
news.summary: ING Group has received notification from the European Central Bank regarding the 2024 Supervisory Review and Evaluation Process (SREP). This decision will impact ING's prudential requirements for the future, specifically the capital requirements for the year 2025.

news.headline: Cobram Estate partners with Chef Curtis Stone to promote California EVOO quality. Woodland, Calif., Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: A collaboration lasting a year will highlight the exceptional quality and culinary flexibility of Cobram Estate's 100% California Extra Virgin Olive Oil. Located in WOODLAND, California, the partnership was unveiled on December 11, 2024. Cobram Estate, a top producer of high-quality extra virgin olive oil in California, disclosed the news.

news.headline: Inventor from La Puente, Calif. creates ODOR ELIMINATOR toilet seat to reduce bathroom odors.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 11, 2024, an inventor from La Puente, California, shared the development of the ODOR ELIMINATOR, aimed to tackle embarrassing bathroom odors. The invention provides a new approach to combating smells, serving as an alternative to common air fresheners.

news.headline: Carson City, Nevada is showcased as a winter destination in a new holiday film promoting an ideal vacation experience.
news.summary: Carson City, located in Nevada, provides a picturesque backdrop with its snow-covered peaks and charming streets for a promotional movie that showcases the city as a perfect destination for a winter getaway. The film aims to attract tourists to experience an idyllic vacation in the state's capital. The news originates from a press release dated December 11, 2024, and portrays the collision of small-town allure with the allure of a winter holiday in Carson City.

news.headline: Ready. Set. Food! and ObvioHealth recruit 1,100 participants for infant food allergy study - a successful collaboration.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 11, 2024, Ready. Set. Food!, a prominent company specializing in early allergen introduction products, has partnered with ObvioHealth, a leading provider of digital clinical trial services, to commence the Early Allergen... study. Through their successful initial recruitment efforts, they have achieved the participation of 1,100 individuals from diverse backgrounds.

news.headline: Applications open for NSLC Summer 2025 programs, with 8 new residential programs in the U.S. and Oxford, U.K., and day programs in Chicago and LA.
news.summary: In an announcement made on December 11, 2024, the National Student Leadership Conference (NSLC) revealed the launch of eight new residential programs across the United States and in Oxford, U.K. Additionally, new day-only programs will be offered in Chicago and Los Angeles. This initiative aims to provide immersive pre-college experiences for middle and high school students. The programs will cater to a significant number of students seeking to enhance their leadership skills and academic knowledge before entering college.

news.headline: Arbitrum, Sequence, Ubisoft launch Niji Warriors NFT collection with Magic Eden, Captain Laserhawk: The G.A.M.E. on Dec 18.
news.summary: Today in San Francisco, the Arbitrum Foundation, Ubisoft, and Sequence have joined forces with Magic Eden for the release of the Niji Warriors NFT collection. The collaboration marks the launch of Captain NFT, scheduled to begin on December 11, 2024.

news.headline: Blockchain Capital's tokenized fund BCAP upgrades to ZKsync, announces dividend; aims to boost VC investment access.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in San Francisco, Blockchain Capital (BCAP), a well-known venture company in the blockchain industry, revealed enhancements to its tokenized venture fund. The upgrades emphasize the firm's dedication to decentralization and efficiency in venture capital investments.

news.headline: PayJoy empowers 13 million customers worldwide through smartphone finance, driving financial stability in emerging markets.
news.summary: Ethical lending practices are significantly contributing to the improved financial stability of millions of underserved individuals globally. PayJoy, a leading financial service provider catering to underserved populations in developing economies, recently revealed notable achievements in its 2024 PayJoy Impact Report. This report highlights the positive impact of ethical lending on financial inclusion, showcasing how it has benefited a substantial number of individuals globally. Through its initiatives, PayJoy has made a significant difference in the lives of underserved individuals by providing access to vital financial services.

news.headline: ANNKE offers up to 60% off on security cameras for Christmas; last-minute shoppers can save big. Los Angeles, Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: ANNKE, a prominent name in the home and business security sector, is excited to announce exclusive Christmas discounts. Customers can enjoy up to a 60% discount on selected security camera products. This offer is available for last-minute shoppers as well. The promotion is set to take place in Los Angeles on December 11, 2024.

news.headline: Nucor increases cash dividend to $0.55/share for stockholders, payable Feb 11, 2025.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Charlotte, N.C., the Board of Directors of Nucor Corporation (NYSE: NUE) disclosed the upsurge of its regular quarterly cash dividend on Nucor's common stock to $0.55 per share. This enhanced cash dividend will be disbursed on February 11, 2025 to stockholders of the corporation.

news.headline: Flare secures $30M Series B to dominate Threat Exposure Management market led by Base10 Partners.
news.summary: Montreal-based cybersecurity company Flare, known for its expertise in Threat Exposure Management (TEM), has disclosed a significant development on Dec. 11, 2024. They have successfully secured a substantial USD $30 million in their Series B funding round, with Base10 Partners taking the lead in this investment. This support will bolster Flare's position in the market and enable them to expand their reach in tackling threat exposure management.

news.headline: Got Wheels! older adult transportation program by Peninsula Family Service is expanding to support more areas in San Mateo County as of December 1, 2024.
news.summary: A new announcement was made in San Mateo, California on December 11, 2024, revealing that Got Wheels!, an affordable transportation initiative for older adults established by Peninsula Family Service (PFS) in 2019, is set to broaden its reach to assist more areas within San Mateo County. Starting from December 1, 2024, Got Wheels! will extend its services to reach an increased number of individuals in the region.

news.headline: Visual Comfort & Co. opens 4,000 sq-ft showroom in Alpharetta, GA featuring diverse lighting, design partner collections.
news.summary: Houston-based company Visual Comfort & Co. has revealed the launch of its new showroom in Alpharetta. Spanning 4,000 square feet, the showroom features a wide array of lighting options across various categories and styles, encompassing design partner collections like Suzanne Kasler.

news.headline: Trend Micro scored 100% coverage rate in MITRE ATT&CK Evaluations, leaving attackers nowhere to hide.
news.summary: In a recent report on December 11, 2024, Trend Micro Incorporated, a top global cybersecurity company listed as TYO: 4704 and TSE: 4704, unveiled its powerful defense system, Trend Vision One™. This groundbreaking technology ensures attackers have no escape routes by providing robust security measures. The company showcased remarkable performance in the most recent MITRE ATT&CK® Evaluations, further solidifying its position as a leader in the cybersecurity industry.

news.headline: South Africa Flour and Grain Mill Products Manufacturing Industry Report by 2024 featuring top players Pioneer Foods, Tiger Brands, and more - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A new report titled "Manufacture of Flour and Grain Mill Products Industry in South Africa" has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report delves into the production of flour and grain mill products in South Africa, particularly the milling of maize and wheat. It covers details on production levels, consumption patterns, commodity and food prices, as well as consumption trends and future production forecasts. The report also features insights on significant industry players, key trends, pressing issues, and factors influencing the market.

news.headline: Global e-methane market forecast for 2024-2034 shows significant growth due to increased focus on sustainable energy solutions.
news.summary: A report on the global e-methane market has been released, forecasting a substantial growth potential from 2024 to 2034. The market analysis focuses on end-use industries, forms and storage, production technology, carbon capture sources, and regions. With the increasing shift towards sustainable energy solutions and decarbonization initiatives in challenging sectors, the e-methane market is expected to experience significant expansion. This growth trend presents lucrative opportunities for stakeholders and businesses operating in the industry.

news.headline: Gotransverse and Nextian are partnering to streamline Quote-to-Cash processes with automated pricing and operations, revolutionizing the industry in Austin, Texas.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Gotransverse and Nextian have formed a partnership to integrate CPQ and billing systems. This collaboration aims to streamline pricing procedures and enhance operational efficiency for Quote-to-Cash processes.

news.headline: Ireland's RegTech market forecast 18.7% CAGR during 2024-2029, set to reach US$790.67 million by 2029 - ResearchAndMarkets.com
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on Ireland's RegTech industry highlights significant growth opportunities. The sector is projected to expand by 28.7% annually, reaching a value of US$335.27 million by 2024. The report provides comprehensive data on key performance indicators such as market size, industry breakdown, technology usage, product types, deployment methods, and market share. This growth trend is expected to continue steadily in the coming years, indicating a promising outlook for RegTech in Ireland.

news.headline: Blackhawk Network & Gopuff team up to offer fast gift card delivery with online grocery orders. Just in time for the holidays.
news.summary: Conveniently timed for the upcoming holiday shopping rush, consumers in Pleasanton, California can now include physical gift cards in their online grocery purchases and have them swiftly delivered to their homes. A recent collaboration between Blackhawk Network (BHN), a renowned global branded payments provider, and Instant Commerce platform Gopuff allows customers to purchase physical gift cards from a selection of top brands for immediate delivery with their order of numerous everyday necessities like groceries, alcohol, and holiday baking items. This partnership brings the ease of obtaining physical gift cards alongside essential items to shoppers, offering them a wide range of choices in a hassle-free manner.

news.headline: BIC undergoes significant governance changes, altering long-standing structures to adapt to the modern era.
InventHelp inventor creates EXPANDA RACK, a new cargo rack for bicycles, as alternative to traditional racks.
news.summary: An inventor from Houston, Texas shared the inspiration behind his creation of the EXPANDA RACK in Pittsburgh on December 11, 2024. His goal was to find a more efficient method of transporting larger and heavier items on a bicycle. This innovative design represents a new option compared to regular bicycle cargo racks, showing promise for improved functionality. The inventor's motivation led to the development of a product that could potentially revolutionize the way cyclists handle cumbersome loads, with significant implications for the cycling community.

news.headline: Bechtler Museum to exhibit "Virginia Jaramillo: Principle of Equivalence," first major retrospective, from Feb 8 - June 8, 2025.
news.summary: A comprehensive exhibition showcasing the revolutionary work of Latina artist Virginia Jaramillo throughout her remarkable six-decade career will be held from February 8 to June 8, 2025. This retrospective will take place in Charlotte, North Carolina. The Bechtler Museum of Modern Art is spearheading this initiative to broaden the representation of global modernism. Known as "Virginia Jaramillo: Principle," this exhibit is set to shed light on the artist's impactful contributions.

news.headline: Domino® Sugar shares 10 holiday baking pitfalls to avoid for sweet success. Important date: Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on December 11, 2024, it was reported that during the holiday season, baking is a popular activity for creating cherished memories. However, the rush of the season can lead to errors that may ruin your baked treats. Domino® Sugar, a well-known brand in American households, shared insights on the top 10 common mistakes to avoid while baking.
